DownloadAllDesc: Export every question currently in the database as a JSON or CSV file.
UploadDesc: Upload a JSON file to import questions. Items where MainText or QuestionText already exists in the database will be skipped.
UploadDescCsv: Upload a CSV file to import questions. Commas inside field values must be wrapped in quotes. Items where MainText or QuestionText already exists in the database will be skipped.
CsvTemplateHintEditor: Open the file in a plain text editor (e.g. Notepad on Windows, TextEdit on Mac) to see the double-quote characters that wrap fields containing commas. Excel hides these quotes and may strip them on save.
CsvTemplateHintExcel: If you need to include a comma inside a cell, simply type the value normally—Excel will automatically add the surrounding quotes when you Save As → CSV UTF-8 (Comma delimited). Do not manually type the quotes in Excel; let Excel handle the escaping.
DownloadTemplateDesc: Download a JSON template with two example questions showing the correct format for upload.
RemoveAllDesc: Permanently delete every question from the database. A full JSON backup will be downloaded automatically before deletion.
RemoveAllWarning1: This will permanently delete all questions from the database.
RemoveAllWarning2: A JSON backup of all questions will be downloaded to your computer before deletion.
YesDeleteAll: Yes, delete all and download backup
